channel.title: LastBrowser Blog
channel.description: Development updates and news for LastBrowser — the open-source productivity workspace browser.

item.title: New Website: PWA, Dark Theme, Docs Search
item.description: The LastBrowser website got a massive overhaul — PWA support, mobile nav, Fuse.js search, self-hosted fonts, and more.

item.title: LastBrowser v0.2.0 Released
item.description: Major update with v2 architecture, multi-agent system, kanban boards, split view, focus mode, and command palette.

item.title: LastBrowser: A New Open-Source Browser
item.description: Introducing LastBrowser — an Electron-based productivity workspace browser, open source under MIT.
